mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO adj_factor (ts_code, trade_date, adj_factor) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.adjFactor})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM adj_factor WHERE (ts_code, trade_date) IN
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT ts_code, MAX(trade_date) AS latest_date FROM adj_factor GROUP BY ts_code
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.ts_code) FROM daily_quote d LEFT JOIN adj_factor a ON d.ts_code = a.ts_code AND d.trade_date = a.trade_date WHERE d.trade_date >= #{startDate} AND a.ts_code IS NULL
